title: Ham #1990
definition:
Ham = "hot" or "sunburnt"

 1) the place where Chedorlaomer and his allies smote the Zuzim, probably
    in the territory of the Ammonites, east of the Jordan; site uncertain
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ham = "hot" or "sunburnt"

 1) the place where Chedorlaomer and his allies smote the Zuzim, probably
    in the territory of the Ammonites, east of the Jordan; site uncertain

    NASB:  a place in Pal.
